title: Relaxed NYC Landmarks and Photography
summary: This seven-day trip through New York City focuses on exploring iconic landmarks at a leisurely pace, ideal for photography enthusiasts who enjoy walking around the city.

activities.title: Central Park South Entrance
activities.location: 5th Avenue and West 59th Street, New York City
activities.notes: Start your day with a visit to the southern end of Central Park for early morning light.

activities.title: Central Park Zoo
activities.location: 5th Avenue and East 64th Street, New York City

activities.title: Bethesda Terrace and Fountain

activities.notes: Capture the iconic Bethesda Fountain in various lighting conditions.

activities.notes: Enjoy panoramic views of the city skyline. Visit during golden hour for dramatic shots.

activities.notes: Explore the museum before accessing the statue. Capture detailed shots from inside.

activities.notes: Wander through the museum to understand immigration history. Outdoor areas offer scenic photo ops.

activities.title: Midtown Night Walk

activities.notes: Arrive early to avoid crowds.
